name: EdgeNXT Route Servers
notes:
# **EdgeNXT Route Servers**
________________________________________
This is the entry for the EdgeNXT Route Servers, present at all of EdgeNXT the operated Peering LANs.

We recommend setting maxprefix on BGP sessions to the values listed above.

For Redundancy purposes, we run two route servers (RS1,RS2) running BIRDv2 which support RPKI and IRRdb filtering.
________________________________________
#### **Route Server Control**
You may use Large Communities to control route redistribution via the route servers:  
•	Send prefix to all         **150528:1:0**  
•	Send prefix to $Peer-AS only       	**150528:1:<$Peer-AS>**  
•	Do not send prefix to all 		       **150528:0:0**  
•	Do not send prefix to $Peer-AS      **150528:0:<$Peer-AS>**  


There are additional communities for controlling announcements:  
    •	GRACEFUL_SHUTDOWN     		     **65500:1:0**  
    •	BLACKHOLE     			       **65500:1:666**  
    •	NO-EXPORT     				       **150528:1::65551**  
    •	NO-ADVERTISE     			       **150528:1::65552**  
________________________________________
